arts.ttl: Monza vs. Juventus to get back to winning ways
arts.sum: Monza`s first victory in its history in Serie A came against Juventus, on 18 September 2022 at U-Power Stadium 1-0 with a goal scored by Christian Gytkjær. Monza have earned the fewest points in home games in Serie A this season: only three in eight matches at the U-Power Stadium (3D, 5L).
